title: Optimizers
description: A comprehensive guide to all 13 PyTorch optimizers and 15 learning rate schedulers — SGD, Adam, AdamW, adaptive methods, quasi-Newton, and the full lr_scheduler suite — with update-rule derivations, hyperparameter intuition, and side-by-side PyTorch and TensorFlow implementations.

readings.title: What Is an Optimizer?
readings.description: Gradient descent mechanics, the PyTorch optimizer interface, param groups, gradient clipping, and a practical selection guide.

readings.title: SGD & Momentum Methods
readings.description: Vanilla SGD, momentum, Nesterov acceleration, ASGD averaging, and Rprop's sign-based per-parameter step sizes.

readings.title: Adaptive Learning Rate Methods
readings.description: Adagrad's accumulated squared gradients, RMSprop's exponential moving average fix, and Adadelta's learning-rate-free design.

readings.title: The Adam Family
readings.description: Adam, AdamW, Adamax, NAdam, RAdam, and SparseAdam — moment estimates, bias correction, decoupled weight decay, and variance rectification.

readings.title: Second-Order & Advanced Techniques
readings.description: LBFGS quasi-Newton with closure, param groups for layer-wise learning rates, gradient clipping, and fused optimizer kernels.

readings.title: Learning Rate Schedulers
readings.description: StepLR, MultiStepLR, ExponentialLR, PolynomialLR, ConstantLR, LinearLR, CosineAnnealingLR, ReduceLROnPlateau, LambdaLR, and MultiplicativeLR.

readings.title: Advanced Schedulers & Composition
readings.description: CosineAnnealingWarmRestarts, CyclicLR, OneCycleLR super-convergence, SequentialLR, ChainedScheduler, and warmup-then-decay patterns.

drills.title: SGD, Adaptive Methods & the Adam Family

labs.title: Optimizers in PyTorch
labs.description: Implement all 13 optimizers, visualize trajectories on the Rosenbrock function, compare convergence on CIFAR-10, and benchmark OneCycleLR super-convergence.

labs.title: Optimizers in TensorFlow
labs.description: TensorFlow/Keras optimizer equivalents, custom RAdam optimizer subclass, LR scheduling with callbacks, and parity check vs PyTorch.
